gt_sql: SELECT T1.artist FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'Phyrexian'
pred_sql: SELECT c.artist FROM foreign_data f JOIN cards c ON f.uuid = c.uuid WHERE f.language = 'Phyrexian';
question: Please provide the names of the artists who illustrated the card art in Phyrexian.
